11211:515762.name: UX Guidelines for Text Boxes Layout and Sizing Fixed Width: The text box has a fixed width of 94px. Text Alignment: All text inside the box must be centered. Line Limit: The box can display a maximum of two lines of text. Handling Overflow If the text on the second line exceeds the 94px width, truncate it and add an ellipsis (...). The ellipsis should be placed at the end of the visible text to indicate that more content exists but is hidden.
11211:515762.text_content:
UX Guidelines for Text Boxes

Layout and Sizing
Fixed Width: The text box has a fixed width of 94px.
Text Alignment: All text inside the box must be centered.
Line Limit: The box can display a maximum of two lines of text.

Handling Overflow
If the text on the second line exceeds the 94px width, truncate it and add an ellipsis (...).
The ellipsis should be placed at the end of the visible text to indicate that more content exists but is hidden.
